tasks.label: inspect egypt output counts
args: $root='output/ohm_collections/egypt-historical-collection-real'; $files=@('borders_final/ohm_borders.jsonl','entities_final/egypt_collection.jsonl','relations_final/ohm_relation_entities.jsonl','relations_final/ohm_relation_hints.jsonl','reports/included.jsonl','reports/excluded.jsonl'); foreach ($file in $files) { $path=Join-Path $root $file; if (Test-Path $path) { $count=(Get-Content $path | Measure-Object -Line).Lines; Write-Output ($file + '|' + $count) } else { Write-Output ($file + '|MISSING') } }

tasks.label: inspect egypt output counts
args: $root="output/ohm_collections/egypt-historical-collection-real"; $files=@("borders_final/ohm_borders.jsonl","entities_final/egypt_collection.jsonl","relations_final/ohm_relation_entities.jsonl","relations_final/ohm_relation_hints.jsonl","reports/included.jsonl","reports/excluded.jsonl"); foreach ($file in $files) { $path=Join-Path $root $file; if (Test-Path $path) { $count=(Get-Content $path | Measure-Object -Line).Lines; Write-Output ($file + "|" + $count) } else { Write-Output ($file + "|MISSING") } }

tasks.label: inspect egypt output counts cmd
args: if exist "output\ohm_collections\egypt-historical-collection-real\borders_final\ohm_borders.jsonl" (for /f %C in ('find /v /c "" ^< "output\ohm_collections\egypt-historical-collection-real\borders_final\ohm_borders.jsonl"') do @echo borders_final/ohm_borders.jsonl^|%C) else @echo borders_final/ohm_borders.jsonl^|MISSING & if exist "output\ohm_collections\egypt-historical-collection-real\entities_final\egypt_collection.jsonl" (for /f %C in ('find /v /c "" ^< "output\ohm_collections\egypt-historical-collection-real\entities_final\egypt_collection.jsonl"') do @echo entities_final/egypt_collection.jsonl^|%C) else @echo entities_final/egypt_collection.jsonl^|MISSING & if exist "output\ohm_collections\egypt-historical-collection-real\relations_final\ohm_relation_entities.jsonl" (for /f %C in ('find /v /c "" ^< "output\ohm_collections\egypt-historical-collection-real\relations_final\ohm_relation_entities.jsonl"') do @echo relations_final/ohm_relation_entities.jsonl^|%C) else @echo relations_final/ohm_relation_entities.jsonl^|MISSING & if exist "output\ohm_collections\egypt-historical-collection-real\relations_final\ohm_relation_hints.jsonl" (for /f %C in ('find /v /c "" ^< "output\ohm_collections\egypt-historical-collection-real\relations_final\ohm_relation_hints.jsonl"') do @echo relations_final/ohm_relation_hints.jsonl^|%C) else @echo relations_final/ohm_relation_hints.jsonl^|MISSING & if exist "output\ohm_collections\egypt-historical-collection-real\reports\included.jsonl" (for /f %C in ('find /v /c "" ^< "output\ohm_collections\egypt-historical-collection-real\reports\included.jsonl"') do @echo reports/included.jsonl^|%C) else @echo reports/included.jsonl^|MISSING & if exist "output\ohm_collections\egypt-historical-collection-real\reports\excluded.jsonl" (for /f %C in ('find /v /c "" ^< "output\ohm_collections\egypt-historical-collection-real\reports\excluded.jsonl"') do @echo reports/excluded.jsonl^|%C) else @echo reports/excluded.jsonl^|MISSING

tasks.label: inspect egypt output counts python
args:
from pathlib import Path
root = Path('output/ohm_collections/egypt-historical-collection-real')
files = [
    'borders_final/ohm_borders.jsonl',
    'entities_final/egypt_collection.jsonl',
    'relations_final/ohm_relation_entities.jsonl',
    'relations_final/ohm_relation_hints.jsonl',
    'reports/included.jsonl',
    'reports/excluded.jsonl',
]
for rel in files:
    path = root / rel
    if path.exists():
        with path.open('r', encoding='utf-8') as handle:
            count = sum(1 for _ in handle)
        print(f'{rel}|{count}')
    else:
        print(f'{rel}|MISSING')

tasks.label: inspect egypt output counts python
args:
from pathlib import Path
root = Path("output/ohm_collections/egypt-historical-collection-real")
files = [
    "borders_final/ohm_borders.jsonl",
    "entities_final/egypt_collection.jsonl",
    "relations_final/ohm_relation_entities.jsonl",
    "relations_final/ohm_relation_hints.jsonl",
    "reports/included.jsonl",
    "reports/excluded.jsonl",
]
for rel in files:
    path = root / rel
    if path.exists():
        with path.open("r", encoding="utf-8") as handle:
            count = sum(1 for _ in handle)
        print(f"{rel}|{count}")
    else:
        print(f"{rel}|MISSING")

tasks.label: Verify Egypt Import Stats
tasks.command: docker compose -f docker/docker-compose.yml exec app php artisan tinker --execute="echo 'geometry_periods=' . DB::table('geometry_periods')->where('created_by','pipeline:egypt-patch-20260531c')->count() . PHP_EOL; echo 'temporal_ranges=' . DB::table('entity_temporal_ranges')->where('source_import','pipeline:egypt-patch-20260531c')->count() . PHP_EOL; echo 'hints=' . DB::table('pipeline_relationship_hints')->where('batch_id','egypt-rel-20260531')->count() . PHP_EOL; echo 'resolved_hints=' . DB::table('pipeline_relationship_hints')->where('batch_id','egypt-rel-20260531')->where('resolved',true)->count() . PHP_EOL;"

tasks.label: Verify Egypt Import Stats SQL
tasks.command: docker compose -f docker/docker-compose.yml exec db psql -U history-mapped -d history-mapped -c "select 'geometry_periods' as metric, count(*) as total from geometry_periods where created_by = 'pipeline:egypt-patch-20260531c' union all select 'temporal_ranges', count(*) from entity_temporal_ranges where source_import = 'pipeline:egypt-patch-20260531c' union all select 'hints', count(*) from pipeline_relationship_hints where batch_id = 'egypt-rel-20260531' union all select 'resolved_hints', count(*) from pipeline_relationship_hints where batch_id = 'egypt-rel-20260531' and resolved = true;"

tasks.label: Count temporal ranges batch

tasks.label: Columns entity temporal ranges v2

tasks.label: Sample imported entity data
tasks.command: docker compose -f docker/docker-compose.yml exec db psql -U history-mapped -d history-mapped -c "select e.name, e.impact_score, tr.start_date, tr.end_date, tr.start_year, tr.end_year from entities e left join entity_temporal_ranges tr on tr.entity_id = e.entity_id and tr.is_primary = true where e.name in ('Memphis','Abydos','Thebes') order by e.name;"

tasks.label: Sample imported entity data v2
tasks.command: docker compose -f docker/docker-compose.yml exec db psql -U history-mapped -d history-mapped -c 'select e.name, e.impact_score, tr.start_date, tr.end_date, tr.start_year, tr.end_year from entities e left join entity_temporal_ranges tr on tr.entity_id = e.entity_id and tr.is_primary = true where e.name in (''Memphis'',''Abydos'',''Thebes'') order by e.name;'

tasks.label: Sample imported location names
tasks.command: docker compose -f docker/docker-compose.yml exec db psql -U history-mapped -d history-mapped -c 'select e.name, l.location_name from entities e join entity_locations l on l.entity_id = e.entity_id and l.is_primary = true where e.name in (''Memphis'',''Abydos'',''Thebes'') order by e.name;'

tasks.label: Inspect Q29223 entity and hints
tasks.command: docker compose -f docker/docker-compose.yml exec db psql -U history-mapped -d history-mapped -c 'select entity_id, name, wikidata_id, verification_status from entities where wikidata_id = ''Q29223'';' ; docker compose -f docker/docker-compose.yml exec db psql -U history-mapped -d history-mapped -c 'select count(*) as hint_refs from pipeline_relationship_hints where target_wikidata_id = ''Q29223'';'

tasks.label: Diagnose Ancient Egypt Relations
tasks.command: docker compose -f docker/docker-compose.yml exec db psql -X -P pager=off -U history-mapped -d history-mapped -c 'select entity_id, name, wikidata_id, verification_status, entity_type, entity_group, created_at from entities where entity_id = ''51e50b5d-f12c-4149-be65-4018d9261c8b'';'; docker compose -f docker/docker-compose.yml exec db psql -X -P pager=off -U history-mapped -d history-mapped -c 'select count(*) as relationship_count from relationships where source_entity_id = ''51e50b5d-f12c-4149-be65-4018d9261c8b'' or target_entity_id = ''51e50b5d-f12c-4149-be65-4018d9261c8b'';'; docker compose -f docker/docker-compose.yml exec db psql -X -P pager=off -U history-mapped -d history-mapped -c 'select count(*) as hint_count from pipeline_relationship_hints where source_entity_id = ''51e50b5d-f12c-4149-be65-4018d9261c8b'' or target_wikidata_id = (select wikidata_id from entities where entity_id = ''51e50b5d-f12c-4149-be65-4018d9261c8b'');';

tasks.label: Diagnose Ancient Egypt Relations v2
tasks.command: docker compose -f docker/docker-compose.yml exec db psql -X -P pager=off -U history-mapped -d history-mapped -c 'select entity_id, name, wikidata_id, verification_status, entity_type, entity_group, created_at from entities where entity_id = ''51e50b5d-f12c-4149-be65-4018d9261c8b'';'; docker compose -f docker/docker-compose.yml exec db psql -X -P pager=off -U history-mapped -d history-mapped -c 'select count(*) as relationship_count from relationships where source_entity_id = ''51e50b5d-f12c-4149-be65-4018d9261c8b'' or target_entity_id = ''51e50b5d-f12c-4149-be65-4018d9261c8b'';'; docker compose -f docker/docker-compose.yml exec db psql -X -P pager=off -U history-mapped -d history-mapped -c 'select count(*) as hint_count from pipeline_relationship_hints where source_entity_id = ''51e50b5d-f12c-4149-be65-4018d9261c8b'' or target_wikidata_id = (select wikidata_id from entities where entity_id = ''51e50b5d-f12c-4149-be65-4018d9261c8b'');';

tasks.label: Inspect Ancient Egypt Duplicates
tasks.command: docker compose -f docker/docker-compose.yml exec db psql -X -P pager=off -U history-mapped -d history-mapped -c 'select entity_id, name, wikidata_id, verification_status, created_at, (select count(*) from relationships r where r.source_entity_id = e.entity_id or r.target_entity_id = e.entity_id) as relationship_count from entities e where e.name = ''Ancient Egypt'' or e.wikidata_id = ''Q11768'' order by created_at asc;'; docker compose -f docker/docker-compose.yml exec db psql -X -P pager=off -U history-mapped -d history-mapped -c 'select e.name as source_name, e.wikidata_id as source_qid, h.target_wikidata_id, h.target_label, h.relationship_type, h.resolved, h.resolution_note, h.batch_id from pipeline_relationship_hints h join entities e on e.entity_id = h.source_entity_id where h.target_label = ''Ancient Egypt'' or h.target_wikidata_id = ''Q11768'' order by h.created_at desc;';

tasks.label: Compare Ancient Egypt Duplicate Rows
tasks.command: docker compose -f docker/docker-compose.yml exec db psql -X -P pager=off -U history-mapped -d history-mapped -c 'select e.entity_id, e.name, e.wikidata_id, e.verification_status, (select count(*) from entity_locations l where l.entity_id = e.entity_id) as location_count, (select count(*) from entity_temporal_ranges tr where tr.entity_id = e.entity_id) as temporal_count, (select count(*) from geometry_periods gp where gp.entity_id = e.entity_id) as geom_period_count, (select count(*) from relationships r where r.source_entity_id = e.entity_id or r.target_entity_id = e.entity_id) as relationship_count from entities e where e.entity_id in (''51e50b5d-f12c-4149-be65-4018d9261c8b'',''7f520c3c-06e2-4a5c-9d7e-c81eba07dbf8'') order by e.created_at asc;';

tasks.label: Rebuild Egypt collection artifacts
tasks.command: $env:PYTHONPATH='.'; py -m pipeline collections egypt-build --xml-index-path output/ohm_collections/map-egypt-clean.xml.sqlite --run-id map-egypt-clean --output-root output/ohm_collections/map-egypt-clean --force

tasks.label: Rebuild Egypt collection artifacts v3
tasks.command: $env:PYTHONPATH='.'; py -m pipeline collections egypt-build --xml-index-path output/ohm_collections/map-egypt-clean.xml.sqlite --run-id map-egypt-clean --output-root output/ohm_collections/map-egypt-clean --force

tasks.command: docker compose -f docker/docker-compose.yml exec app php artisan pipeline:import storage/app/pipeline/egypt-patch/egypt_collection.jsonl --sync --force --batch-id=egypt-fix-20260601 --skip-relationships

tasks.label: Inspect Ancient Egypt after fixed import
tasks.command: docker compose -f docker/docker-compose.yml exec db psql -X -P pager=off -U history-mapped -d history-mapped -c 'select e.entity_id, e.name, e.wikidata_id, e.verification_status, (select count(*) from entity_locations l where l.entity_id = e.entity_id) as location_count, (select count(*) from entity_temporal_ranges tr where tr.entity_id = e.entity_id) as temporal_count, (select count(*) from relationships r where r.source_entity_id = e.entity_id or r.target_entity_id = e.entity_id) as relationship_count from entities e where e.name = ''Ancient Egypt'' or e.wikidata_id = ''Q11768'' order by e.created_at asc;';

tasks.label: Compare Ancient Egypt child rows
tasks.command: docker compose -f docker/docker-compose.yml exec db psql -X -P pager=off -U history-mapped -d history-mapped -c 'select entity_id, location_name, is_primary, st_astext(geom) as geom_wkt from entity_locations where entity_id in (''51e50b5d-f12c-4149-be65-4018d9261c8b'',''7f520c3c-06e2-4a5c-9d7e-c81eba07dbf8'') order by entity_id, location_id;'; docker compose -f docker/docker-compose.yml exec db psql -X -P pager=off -U history-mapped -d history-mapped -c 'select entity_id, range_type, start_year, end_year, start_date, end_date, is_primary from entity_temporal_ranges where entity_id in (''51e50b5d-f12c-4149-be65-4018d9261c8b'',''7f520c3c-06e2-4a5c-9d7e-c81eba07dbf8'') order by entity_id, temporal_range_id;';

tasks.label: Merge Ancient Egypt duplicate rows
tasks.command: docker compose -f docker/docker-compose.yml exec db psql -X -P pager=off -U history-mapped -d history-mapped -c "begin; update entities set wikidata_id = null where entity_id = '7f520c3c-06e2-4a5c-9d7e-c81eba07dbf8'; update relationships set source_entity_id = '51e50b5d-f12c-4149-be65-4018d9261c8b' where source_entity_id = '7f520c3c-06e2-4a5c-9d7e-c81eba07dbf8'; update relationships set target_entity_id = '51e50b5d-f12c-4149-be65-4018d9261c8b' where target_entity_id = '7f520c3c-06e2-4a5c-9d7e-c81eba07dbf8'; update pipeline_relationship_hints set source_entity_id = '51e50b5d-f12c-4149-be65-4018d9261c8b' where source_entity_id = '7f520c3c-06e2-4a5c-9d7e-c81eba07dbf8'; delete from entity_locations where entity_id = '7f520c3c-06e2-4a5c-9d7e-c81eba07dbf8'; delete from entity_temporal_ranges where entity_id = '7f520c3c-06e2-4a5c-9d7e-c81eba07dbf8'; delete from entities where entity_id = '7f520c3c-06e2-4a5c-9d7e-c81eba07dbf8'; update entities set wikidata_id = 'Q11768', impact_score = 97, source_citations = '[{"source":"wikidata","wikidata_id":"Q11768"}]'::jsonb, updated_at = now() where entity_id = '51e50b5d-f12c-4149-be65-4018d9261c8b'; commit;"

tasks.label: Merge Ancient Egypt duplicate rows v2
tasks.command: Get-Content "api/storage/app/merge_ancient_egypt.sql" | docker compose -f docker/docker-compose.yml exec -T db psql -X -P pager=off -U history-mapped -d history-mapped

tasks.label: Verify Ancient Egypt merged entity
tasks.command: docker compose -f docker/docker-compose.yml exec db psql -X -P pager=off -U history-mapped -d history-mapped -c 'select e.entity_id, e.name, e.wikidata_id, e.verification_status, e.impact_score, (select count(*) from entity_locations l where l.entity_id = e.entity_id) as location_count, (select count(*) from entity_temporal_ranges tr where tr.entity_id = e.entity_id) as temporal_count, (select count(*) from relationships r where r.source_entity_id = e.entity_id or r.target_entity_id = e.entity_id) as relationship_count from entities e where e.entity_id = ''51e50b5d-f12c-4149-be65-4018d9261c8b'';'; docker compose -f docker/docker-compose.yml exec db psql -X -P pager=off -U history-mapped -d history-mapped -c 'select count(*) as duplicate_q11768_rows from entities where wikidata_id = ''Q11768'';'; docker compose -f docker/docker-compose.yml exec db psql -X -P pager=off -U history-mapped -d history-mapped -c 'select relationship_type, count(*) from relationships where source_entity_id = ''51e50b5d-f12c-4149-be65-4018d9261c8b'' or target_entity_id = ''51e50b5d-f12c-4149-be65-4018d9261c8b'' group by relationship_type order by relationship_type;';
